citations.title: Introducing computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash
Gemini Can Now Control Your Computer. Hackers Are Already Targeting AI Agents
Yelp Launches the New Yelp Assistant
Building a Bento Grid Layout with Modern CSS Grid

design_plan: Premium editorial landing with cinematic hero, AIDA structure, responsive bento grids using CSS Grid with grid-auto-flow: dense, GSAP-enhanced motion guarded for no-CDN scenarios, Geist/Satoshi font stack, and clear CTA contrast. Emphasis on real workflows (booking tools, inboxes, CRMs) and fair competitor context.
headline:
Super for Local Service Businesses
That Book Jobs, Send Quotes,
and Reply to Customers

site_brief.audience: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies AI assistant
local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

summary: A conversion-focused landing page showing how Super’s personal AI agents operate real software to handle bookings, quotes, and customer replies—reusing a computer-use cache to make repeated workflows faster and cheaper for local service businesses.
